heading: General qualification of officers for promotion to higher permanent grade
label: 3027 General qualification of officers for promotion to higher permanent grade
text: No officer may be promoted to a higher permanent grade on the active list until the officer has passed a satisfactory mental and physical examination in accordance with regulations prescribed by the Secretary.
notes: Prior ProvisionsProvisions similar to those in this section were contained in prior to repeal by .section 854 of this titlePub. L. 107–372
